raw_text:
Sequencing on Illumina NextSeq500 and basecalling by Real-Time Analysis (RTA) software version 2.4.11
Alignment to the mm10 genome using STAR version 2.5.0
mRNA quantitation using featureCounts version 1.5.3 and the option âât exonâ was specified to count mRNA features
Differential expression using DESeq2 version 1.22.1 specifying a false discovery cutoff of 0.01 for independent filtering
Genome_build: mm10
Supplementary_files_format_and_content: Transcripts per kilobase million (TPM) normalized count matrix of mapped reads, and DESeq2 outputs for Bmal1 and Clock knockout comparisons in ".csv" format
